summary: Excellent soundboard (SBD) recording of a great show, praised enthusiastically by the reviewer.
review: The fan describes the concert as a "great show" and thanks the archive for the early‑bird SBD torrent, indicating strong musical performance and a clean soundboard source with no reported audio issues.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights both an excellent performance and a satisfactory soundboard recording; limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, balanced SBD source; reviewer mentions no problems or artifacts.
